codeReview.summary: The original feature commit had the previously reported blocking gaps around sub-dungeon return placement and hidden-area discovery semantics, but the later fix feature `story-scrutiny-fix-zones-loot` resolves both issues in the current code. ZoneScene now applies `targetCol`/`targetRow` when restarting into parent zones, and hidden areas are discovered from explored fog-of-war bounds rather than simple center-radius proximity. No remaining blocking issues were found for this feature after reviewing the original diff, the fix diff, current implementation, and the added regression tests.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The architectural note in `.factory/library/architecture.md` that `changeZone()` ignores target coordinates is stale after the scrutiny fix. Current ZoneScene create/restart flow now honors `targetCol`/`targetRow` for zone transitions and sub-dungeon returns.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md still says 'Currently `changeZone()` ignores target coordinates'; current code uses `const spawnCol = data.targetCol ?? this.mapData.playerStart.col` / `spawnRow = data.targetRow ?? ...` in `src/scenes/ZoneScene.ts`, and `changeZone()` plus `exitSubDungeon()` pass those coordinates through scene restart.

summary: Reviewed the original failing feature, its prior review, the follow-up fix feature, current code, and regression tests. The previously blocking sub-dungeon return-position and hidden-area discovery issues are resolved in the current codebase, so this fix review now passes for `zone-content-runtime-wiring`.
